race.comment: BOOM CRUSHER (8) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 0.6 lengths from the winner this track and trip positioned handy at the turn. Keeps the in-form Cormack, and he gets his chance in this line-up. MORDECAI (4) was well supported in the same contest but had no luck in the run from an awkward gate. He'd placed in a sprint first up prior and has plenty in the tank. Keeps the handy 2kg claim but draws wide again and will need a good ride. SPIRIT TALKER (13) spiked his numbers leading and narrowly beaten in a 62 over 1600m at Rockhampton.  He'd be in the finish again repeating that level of effort. KAYLEEN'S PROFIT (6) comes back in distance and had been racing well before the latest. She should be in the money again.
